title: keylime bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[7.12.1-11]
-  Fix for revocation notifier not closing TLS session correctly
   Resolves: RHEL-109656

[7.12.1-10]
- Support vendor_db: follow-up fix
  Related: RHEL-80455

[7.12.1-9]
- Support vendor_db as logged by newer shim versions
  Resolves: RHEL-80455

[7.12.1-8]
- Fix DB connection leaks
  Resolves: RHEL-108263

[7.12.1-7]
- Fix tmpfiles.d configuration related to the cert store
  Resolves: RHEL-104572

[7.12.1-6]
- Populate cert_store_dir with tpmfiles.d
  Resolves: RHEL-76926

[7.12.1-5]
- Use tmpfiles.d for permissions in /var/lib/keylime and /etc/keylime
  Resolves: RHEL-77144

[7.12.1-4]
- Add new keylime-selinux release - removing keylime_var_log_t label
  Resolves: RHEL-388

[7.12.1-3]
- Avoid changing ownership of /var/log/keylime
  Resolves: RHEL-388

[7.12.1-2]
- Revert changes to default server_key_password for verifier/registrar
  Resolves: RHEL-93678
full_text:
[7.12.1-11]
-  Fix for revocation notifier not closing TLS session correctly
   Resolves: RHEL-109656

[7.12.1-10]
- Support vendor_db: follow-up fix
  Related: RHEL-80455

[7.12.1-9]
- Support vendor_db as logged by newer shim versions
  Resolves: RHEL-80455

[7.12.1-8]
- Fix DB connection leaks
  Resolves: RHEL-108263

[7.12.1-7]
- Fix tmpfiles.d configuration related to the cert store
  Resolves: RHEL-104572

[7.12.1-6]
- Populate cert_store_dir with tpmfiles.d
  Resolves: RHEL-76926

[7.12.1-5]
- Use tmpfiles.d for permissions in /var/lib/keylime and /etc/keylime
  Resolves: RHEL-77144

[7.12.1-4]
- Add new keylime-selinux release - removing keylime_var_log_t label
  Resolves: RHEL-388

[7.12.1-3]
- Avoid changing ownership of /var/log/keylime
  Resolves: RHEL-388

[7.12.1-2]
- Revert changes to default server_key_password for verifier/registrar
  Resolves: RHEL-93678

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20771.html
